title: Copyright Act 1994 — New Zealand Legislation
description: New Zealand legislation consolidating and amending copyright law, covering ownership, duration, infringement, permitted acts, moral rights, and enforcement mechanisms. Relevant for organizations handling creative works, digital content, and intellectual property.
